injuries.comment: The Avalanche announced on Friday (Jun. 6) that O'Connor underwent hip surgery and is expected to miss the next 5 to 6 months.
The Avalanche said on Wednesday (Sept. 17) that Girard is expected to miss part of training camp and is a possibility to return for opening night.
The Avalanche said on Wednesday (Sept. 17) that Blackwood is week-to-week but expected to be ready around the beginning of the season.
